## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's business model, technology, and potential collaboration with Gianpiero Puleo.](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX combines AI-powered workflows with human expertise to scale high-quality content creation and marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [The company's current revenue model is service-based, with plans to open up their platform and API endpoints in the future](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1976.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to capture and replicate expert thought processes, elevating team performance while maintaining human involvement](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

## Topics

### Gianpiero's Background

  - [Master's in machine learning and AI from Italy](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Career spanning action-script development, UX, engineering, and leadership roles](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Recent experience as CEO of US operations (300 people total, 80-90 in US)](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Worked at Splunk and Grammarly, leading product design teams](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Attempted to launch a startup in Italy, faced bureaucratic challenges](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### GrowthX's Origin and Business Model

  - [Marcel's experience at IBM and HubSpot revealed inefficiencies in traditional marketing](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Developed a publication-based marketing approach, generating $17M revenue in first year](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Created a contributor network for high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Transitioned to AI-powered workflows to scale content production (3,000 pages in 6 months, 24x traffic increase, 4x revenue growth)](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Current focus on services with plans to expand into platform offerings and API endpoints](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1976.0)

### GrowthX's Technology and Approach

  - [Workflows translated into code for better management, scalability, and reusability](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [Emphasis on capturing expert thought processes and decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [AI used to elevate team performance, not replace human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [System learns from each iteration, improving efficiency and output quality](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

### Future Plans and Vision

  - [Q3 2023 goal: $15M revenue run rate from services](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Expand into additional verticals (e.g., hiring, sales, design, creative)](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [Open up platform access to customers and monetize API endpoints](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [Potential Series B fundraising by end of 2023](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [Long-term vision of becoming a holding company with multiple brands under a common core](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2117.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to regroup with the team regarding potential collaboration with Gianpiero](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
  - [Explore possibility of in-person meeting, potentially coordinating with Ren's visit to the Bay Area](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [Gianpiero to follow up directly with Ren about his potential visit](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
  - [Continue open communication for any further questions or discussions](https://fathom.video/share/y_6T_98KKU2mWHqroB1yhhzR7vTiFzXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)
